positive: A minimalist, whimsical scene featuring a grouping of stylized forest animals (rabbits, foxes, owls, badgers) curled together in a gentle embrace. The composition is circular and central, viewed from a slightly high angle. The style should be a modern, sophisticated flat illustration mixed with delicate watercolor washes, giving it a slightly textured, storybook feel. Use a rich but muted color palette of deep forest green, mustard yellow, terracotta, and navy blue. Strong silhouettes and crisp linework are essential. The background should be lightly textured parchment or soft pastel color to maximize print versatility. Aspect ratio optimized for apparel printing, ensuring clean edges and high contrast.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, low quality, cartoonish, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distracting background, messy, noise
